place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Five-Islands Beachfront Sunset Villa - Taling Ngam
blurb: A three-storey beachfront estate of around 2,250 m² on the quiet south-west coast of Koh Samui at Taling Ngam, framing uninterrupted sunset views across the bay to the Five Islands. A large infinity pool above its own swimmable beach, an oceanfront pavilion, gym, movie room, sala and library — fully staffed with a private Thai chef. Five main bedrooms plus two adjoining bunk rooms sleep 12 to 18.
detail:
Set on a sheltered, swimmable bay on the tranquil south-western shore of Koh Samui, this three-storey beachfront estate spreads across roughly 2,250 square metres of lawns and terraces, opening straight onto the sand with an uninterrupted outlook to the Five Islands and some of the island's finest sunsets.

A large infinity pool sits above the beach, edged by ten sunbeds and parasols, with a separate children's pool, a jacuzzi and an oceanfront pavilion for sundowners. Manicured gardens make room for volleyball and table tennis, while indoors there is a gym, a movie room, an outdoor dining sala and a library — free Wi-Fi runs throughout. The interiors are crisply contemporary and quintessentially Thai: white walls, dark floors, metallic accents and a floating staircase.

The master suite occupies almost a full floor, with a king bed, walk-in closet, lounge and kitchenette, its own terrace and a bathtub angled to the sea. Four further bedrooms line the pool on the ground floor, each en-suite with a tub and a private deck, and two of them open to adjoining children's rooms fitted with two bunk beds apiece. In all the villa sleeps 10 adults and 4 children in comfort, and up to 18 guests by arrangement.

A full household team looks after every stay — a private chef cooking Thai, Chinese, Western or vegetarian menus to order, daily breakfast and housekeeping, a concierge, and staff on hand throughout. The estate is gated and private, with 24-hour CCTV, alarm systems, in-room safes, BBQ, and private parking. Taling Ngam keeps you close to the island's west-coast beaches, the marina and golf, with Nathon town and the main pier a short drive away.

features.l: Five bedrooms + two bunk kids' rooms
Beachfront infinity pool · kids' pool · jacuzzi
Private Thai chef · breakfast · daily housekeeping
